Taken together, this is not a closed field; it is a live situation where erosion, worry, or leakage moving through choice has to be named before your own position under clarity and success can fully develop. The spread lands in two truths at once: erosion, worry, or leakage moving through choice, and your own position under clarity and success. Where a leverage point is needed, Sun House is it: use visibility responsibly, because the real issue lives in vitality, confidence, and clear progress shine.

rows.finalText: For "What is the next right step in my calling", the cards keep circling back to purpose / calling themes with a right path emphasis. In Past, Querent (29) shows where things already stand: your role and boundaries set the tone. Querent often points to your own stance toward the path, including how much of it is truly chosen and how much is inherited habit in your calling. Present turns on Lily (30), bringing maturity and principled calm support the path to the hinge of the reading and asking for one careful adjustment. Lily often points to the maturity, peace, and ethics layer of the situation, especially where steady ethics stabilize long-term decisions in your calling. What develops in Future through Anchor (35) points to durability and follow-through are rewarded, provided the central pressure is handled honestly. Anchor colors your calling through the version of vocation that can actually be sustained, not just admired from a distance. Querent (29) with Anchor (35) show what most shapes the question of calling: the reading around what you can truly hold, fund, or keep supporting over time. Lily (30) is the real hinge in this spread. Here, Lily emphasizes the maturity, peace, and ethics layer of the situation, especially where steady ethics stabilize long-term decisions. Querent (29) with Anchor (35) keep emphasizing the reading around what you can truly hold, fund, or keep supporting over time. Pair composure with clear intent so Anchor (35) can land as lived experience rather than just possibility.
